description: Create comprehensive visualization of CASP12 domain architecture, active site mutations, and evidence summary
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 10))

# Panel 1: Domain architecture comparison
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_title("A. Domain Architecture: Human CASP12 vs Mouse Casp12", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Mouse Casp12 (419 aa) - functional
y_mouse = 0.7
ax1.barh(y_mouse, 419, height=0.25, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black')
ax1.barh(y_mouse, 92, left=0, height=0.25, color='#4ECDC4', edgecolor='black', label='CARD domain')
ax1.barh(y_mouse, 200, left=100, height=0.25, color='#45B7D1', edgecolor='black', label='Peptidase_C14')
ax1.plot(249, y_mouse, 'r^', markersize=12, zorder=5)  # SHG
ax1.plot(296, y_mouse, 'r*', markersize=15, zorder=5)  # QACRG
ax1.text(249, y_mouse+0.18, 'SHG\n(His)', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(296, y_mouse+0.18, 'QACRG\n(Cys)', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(-30, y_mouse, 'Mouse\nCasp12\n(419 aa)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# Human CASP12 full-length (341 aa, rare allele)
y_human_full = 0.35
ax1.barh(y_human_full, 341, height=0.25, color='#FFE5E5', edgecolor='black')
ax1.barh(y_human_full, 92, left=0, height=0.25, color='#4ECDC4', edgecolor='black')
ax1.barh(y_human_full, 200, left=100, height=0.25, color='#FFCCCC', edgecolor='black')
ax1.plot(171, y_human_full, 'kx', markersize=12, markeredgewidth=3, zorder=5)  # SHS (mutated!)
ax1.plot(220, y_human_full, 'r*', markersize=15, zorder=5)  # QACRG
ax1.text(171, y_human_full+0.18, 'SHS ✗\n(mutated)', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='darkred', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(220, y_human_full+0.18, 'QACRG\n(Cys)', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(-30, y_human_full, 'Human\nCASP12\nfull (341)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# Human CASP12 truncated (124 aa, common allele)
y_human_trunc = 0.0
ax1.barh(y_human_trunc, 124, height=0.25, color='#FFE5E5', edgecolor='black')
ax1.barh(y_human_trunc, 92, left=0, height=0.25, color='#4ECDC4', edgecolor='black')
ax1.plot(125, y_human_trunc, 'ks', markersize=12, zorder=5)  # Stop codon
ax1.text(130, y_human_trunc, 'STOP\n(rs497116)', ha='left', fontsize=8, color='black', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(-30, y_human_trunc, 'Human\nCASP12\ntrunc (124)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

ax1.set_xlim(-80, 440)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.2, 1.1)
ax1.set_xlabel('Amino acid position')
ax1.set_yticks([])

# Panel 2: Active site alignment
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title("B. Active Site Motif Comparison (SHG box and QACRG)", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axis('off')

alignment_data = [
    ("Human CASP1 (active)", "F L V F M", "S H G", "I R E G I", "... K V I I I", "Q A C R G", "D S P G V"),
    ("Human CASP4 (active)", "F L V L M", "S H G", "I L E G I", "... K V I I V", "Q A C R G", "A N R G E"),
    ("Mouse Casp12 (active)", "F L V F M", "S H G", "I L E G I", "... K I L I M", "Q A C R G", "R Y N G T"),
    ("Human CASP12 (inactive)", "F L V F M", "S H S", "I L N G I", "... K V I I M", "Q A C R G", "N G A G I"),
]

y_start = 0.85
for i, (label, pre_shg, shg, post_shg, pre_qa, qacrg, post_qa) in enumerate(alignment_data):
    y = y_start - i * 0.22
    color = 'red' if 'inactive' in label else 'black'
    weight = 'bold' if 'inactive' in label else 'normal'
    
    ax2.text(0.02, y, label, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', color=color, fontweight=weight,
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')
    ax2.text(0.32, y, pre_shg, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')
    
    shg_color = 'red' if shg == "S H S" else 'green'
    bbox = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow' if shg_color=='green' else '#FFD0D0', 
                edgecolor=shg_color, linewidth=2)
    ax2.text(0.47, y, shg, fontsize=11, fontfamily='monospace', fontweight='bold',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', bbox=bbox, color=shg_color)
    
    ax2.text(0.55, y, post_shg, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')
    ax2.text(0.68, y, pre_qa, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')
    
    bbox2 = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2)
    ax2.text(0.82, y, qacrg, fontsize=11, fontfamily='monospace', fontweight='bold',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center', bbox=bbox2, color='green')
    
    ax2.text(0.93, y, post_qa, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')

# Add header
ax2.text(0.47, y_start + 0.12, 'SHG box', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', ha='center',
         transform=ax2.transAxes, color='darkblue')
ax2.text(0.82, y_start + 0.12, 'QACRG', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', ha='center',
         transform=ax2.transAxes, color='darkblue')

# Panel 3: Summary of evidence
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_title("C. Evidence Summary: Does Human CASP12 Have Endopeptidase Activity?", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax3.axis('off')

evidence_text = """
AGAINST endopeptidase activity:
  • UniProt names it "Inactive caspase-12" (Q6UXS9)
  • SHG→SHS mutation destroys catalytic dyad (Fischer et al. 2002, PMID:12054529)
  • Premature stop codon at pos 125 in most humans (rs497116) removes entire catalytic domain
  • GO IKR annotation: NOT|enables GO:0004197 (PMID:12054529)
  • Even mouse Casp12 activity is confined to autoprocessing only (Roy et al. 2008, PMID:18332441)
  • Catalytic function not needed for biological role (Saleh et al. 2006, PMID:16625199)
  • Caspase-12 dimerization not detected by any treatment (Sanders et al. 2015, PMID:26158519)

FOR endopeptidase activity (IBA annotation):
  • QACRG catalytic motif is conserved in the full-length allele
  • InterPro: Pept_C14 (Peptidase_C14) domain detected
  • Phylogenetic inference (PAINT) from caspase ancestor

VERDICT: IBA annotation is OVER-ANNOTATED — should be removed or qualified
"""
ax3.text(0.02, 0.95, evidence_text, fontsize=9, fontfamily='monospace',
         transform=ax3.transAxes, va='top', ha='left',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('casp12_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved as casp12_analysis.png")
